name: cole
desc: A gentle young man in his late twenties: the village lamplighter. Neat black hair in an undercut swept back, curious dark brown eyes, warm friendly features, a calm kind manner. He wears a long charcoal dark-grey cape draped softly over both shoulders like a shawl and falling behind to his ankles, clasped at the throat with a small brass flame-shaped pin, over a white band-collar shirt with full sleeves and a dark green laced vest with cord X-lacing down the front, brown pants, and brown boots. No chest strap.
sheetHint: same face, black undercut swept back, long charcoal cape draped softly over both shoulders and falling behind to the ankles, brass flame pin at the throat, white band-collar shirt, dark green laced vest, brown pants, brown boots, no chest strap

expressions.happy: a bright open smile, eyes lit up
expressions.worried: brows knit, small anxious frown, eyes glancing aside
expressions.determined: firm set jaw, focused eyes, faint confident smirk
expressions.tender: soft eyes, small warm smile, head fractionally tilted — the look of giving someone their name back
